diagrams.title: Happened-Before Relation Example
diagrams.description: Three processes P1, P2, P3 with events showing local events, message sends and receives, and the transitive happened-before connections
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how causality is captured across processes and how to determine if e1→e2

diagrams.title: Lamport Timestamp Evolution
diagrams.description: Shows how Lamport logical clocks increment at each process and update on message receipt
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how timestamps are assigned and how receive events catch up to maintain consistency

diagrams.title: Vector Clock Updates
diagrams.description: Two processes exchanging messages showing vector clock components and update rules
elements: Vector displayed as [P1,P2] at each event
Receive shows max computation and increment
Highlighting of comparison to detect concurrency
diagrams.purpose: Understanding vector clock mechanics and how causality is captured vs concurrent detection

diagrams.title: Concurrent vs Causally Related Events
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of vector clock scenarios showing when events are concurrent vs causally related
elements: Vector clock pairs as points in 2D space
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how to determine relationship between events using vector clock comparison

visuals.title: Logical Time And Logical Clocks
visuals.description: Visual diagram for logical time and logical clocks
